error_signature: API requires credentials as query parameters
title: Using credentials in HTTP request URL
symptom: The user is unable to replace hardcoded credentials in the HTTP request URL with n8n credentials, leading to security concerns.
applies_when: API requires credentials as query parameters
not_this_if: API supports Basic Auth or Header Auth
root_cause: The API being accessed requires both username and password to be passed as query parameters, which is not compatible with Basic Auth or Header Auth methods. Instead, Custom Auth must be used to handle multiple query parameters securely.
fix_steps: In the Authentication section, select Generic Credential Type.
For Generic Auth Type, choose Custom Auth.
Create a new credential with the required query parameters in JSON format.
Use the base URL in your HTTP Request node without hardcoded credentials.
agent_instruction: Set up Custom Auth in the HTTP Request node to securely pass credentials as query parameters.
